# Test: apx lint on an empty directory (no schema files)
# A freshly-scaffolded canonical repo has no APIs yet.
# lint and breaking should succeed gracefully instead of erroring.

# Setup: canonical repo with no schema files
mkdir empty-repo
cd empty-repo
exec apx config init

# lint with no path (defaults to ".") should succeed
exec apx lint
stdout 'No schema files found'

# lint with an explicit empty directory should succeed
mkdir subdir
exec apx lint subdir
stdout 'No schema files found'

# breaking with no path should also succeed
exec apx breaking --against HEAD
stdout 'No schema files found'

# lint with a single unknown file should still error
cp $WORK/no-schema.txt unknown.txt
! exec apx lint unknown.txt
stderr 'could not detect schema format'

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf empty-repo

-- no-schema.txt --
this is not a schema file
